title: Begegnung mit Werther
writer: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe, Hermann Gressieker, Karl-Heinz Stroux
actors: Horst Caspar, Heidemarie Hatheyer, Paul Klinger
plot: The infatuated young Werther (Horst Caspar) meets in a village at a festivity the beautiful Lotte (Heidemarie Hatheyer) and falls in love with her. But Lotte is already engaged. Werther realizes that his love is hopeless and leave...
